title: Filipino Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender beef, inspired by Filipino cuisine.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef in batches, about 5 minutes per batch, then set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fish sauce, patis, and brown sugar, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the browned beef back into the pot, along with the bay leaves and black pepper.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt to taste, then serve hot over rice.
